data.title: Camping World Holdings, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), based in Lincolnshire, Illinois, and known as America's Largest Recreational Vehicle Dealer, disclosed its first-quarter outcomes for the period concluding on March 31, 2026. Matthew Wagner, the Chief Executive Officer and President of CWH, expressed contentment with the results given the prevailing conditions in the RV sector. Although there was a setback in used RV sales in January, the company managed to deliver promising performance overall.

data.title: Mattel Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Toy company Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) based in El Segundo, California, announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. CEO Ynon Kreiz expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, noting a growth in Net Sales and strong consumer demand for their products during the quarter. Mattel is focused on expanding its IP-driven play and family entertainment business, with noticeable top-line acceleration in the current second quarter. Progress is also being made in their digital strategy.

data.title: FCPT Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results
data.description: Four Corners Property Trust, Inc. based in Mill Valley, California, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, listed as FCPT on the NYSE, reported a positive start to the year. Following successful efforts in 2025, including raising a record amount of liquidity and reducing leverage, FCPT secured a $200 million Term Loan at a favorable rate for investing in new opportunities. CEO Bill Lene highlighted the company's strong position and strategic financial moves, aiming to capitalize on the investment pipeline with loan terms that offer significant advantages over historical acquisition yields.

data.title: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. (Nasdaq: SFM) released their quarterly results for the 13-week period ending March 29, 2026, in Phoenix. CEO Jack Sinclair stated that the first quarter unfolded according to expectations. The company is concentrating on enhancing customer interaction, foraging, and discovery, alongside fortifying their supply chain and increasing the availability of nutritious food. They are optimistic about their future prospects and anticipate growth in the upcoming quarters.

data.title: Tenable Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Tenable has surpassed revenue and profit expectations for the first quarter, with figures surpassing initial projections. As a result, the company has decided to revise its full-year outlook upwards. The positive performance in Q1 has led to increased confidence in Tenable's ability to achieve strong financial results for the rest of the year. The exact revenue and profit numbers have not been disclosed, but the strong showing in the first quarter has prompted a reevaluation of expectations for the entire fiscal year. This indicates that Tenable is on track for a successful year financially.

data.title: UFP Industries Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan, on April 29, 2026, UFP Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: UFPI), a prominent manufacturer emphasizing value-added products in Retail, Packaging, and Construction sectors, disclosed its first-quarter 2026 results. The company recorded impressive Net Sales amounting to $1.46 billion during this period.

data.title: Swarmer and HIMERA Partner to Integrate Resilient Communications into Advanced Autonomous Systems
data.description: A recent partnership has introduced jamming-resistant communications technology to Swarmer's latest autonomy stack. This collaborative effort aims to enhance Swarmer's next-generation autonomy capabilities. The partnership focuses on integrating jamming-resistant communication features to ensure seamless connectivity in adverse conditions. This advancement is expected to bolster Swarmer's autonomy stack by providing increased reliability and effectiveness in communication. The collaboration brings together innovative solutions to combat signal interference, with the goal of improving Swarmer's overall performance in challenging environments. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in advancing Swarmer's autonomy capabilities, promising enhanced communication resilience for the next-gen autonomy stack.

data.title: Neurocrine Biosciences Announces Publication Establishing Clinically Meaningful Improvement Threshold for the Tardive Dyskinesia Impact Scale
data.description: A recent study detailed in The Journal of Clinical Psychiatry examines the effects of INGREZZA® (valbenazine) capsules on patient well-being throughout the KINECT® clinical program. The research identifies a significant threshold for improvement on the Tardive Dyskinesia Impact Scale, signifying a notable impact on patient-reported outcomes. This publication marks a milestone in understanding the efficacy of INGREZZA®, shedding light on its beneficial effects in managing tardive dyskinesia symptoms.

data.title: AVITA Medical Announces TGA Certification in Australia and Medsafe WAND Listing in New Zealand for RECELL GO
data.description: AVITA Medical has obtained certification from the Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA) for RECELL GO in Australia, marking a significant milestone for the advancement of Spray-On Skin technology in burn and acute wound treatment. The certification ensures the product meets the necessary quality and safety standards. This approval will allow AVITA Medical to offer an innovative solution for treating burns and acute wounds in Australia, benefiting numerous patients. The certification of RECELL GO highlights the company's commitment to improving medical treatments and further establishes its presence in the global healthcare market.

data.title: Aflac Incorporated Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Today, Aflac Incorporated (NYSE: AFL) announced its first quarter results in Columbus, Ga. The total revenues for the quarter amounted to $4.3 billion, showing a significant 27.9% growth compared to the previous year. Net earnings reached $1.0 billion, resulting in $1.98 per diluted share. This marks a substantial increase in performance for the company.

data.title: Zoom to Release Financial Results for the First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2027
data.description: Zoom Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZM) based in San Jose, California, revealed on April 29, 2026, that they are set to unveil their financial performance for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2027 on Thursday, May 21, 2026, post the market closure.

data.title: Equinix Reports First-Quarter Results and Raises Full-Year Financial Outlook
data.description: Monthly recurring revenue increased by 12% when reported, and by 10% on a normalized and constant currency basis year over year. The company achieved its largest first-quarter annualized gross bookings in history, resulting in a record backlog. Stabilized assets' revenues also saw a 9% increase.

data.title: California Water Service Group Board of Directors Declares 325th Consecutive Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in San Jose, California, the California Water Service Group (NYSE: CWT) announced its 325th consecutive quarterly dividend. The dividend amounts to $0.3350 per common share and will be paid on May 22, 2026. Shareholders of record as of the end of business on May 11, 2026, are eligible to receive the dividend.

data.title: Alector to Discontinue Phase 2 PROGRESS-AD Trial of Nivisnebart (AL101/GSK4527226) in Early Alzheimer’s Disease Following Interim Futility Analysis
data.description: The trial was assessed by the Independent Data Monitoring Committee (IDMC) and found to be unlikely to achieve the primary endpoint.

data.title: Viking Therapeutics Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provides Corporate Update
data.description: A conference call has been arranged for today at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The Phase 3 VANQUISH Trials for Subcutaneous VK2735 in Obesity have progressed, with both VANQUISH-1 and VANQUISH-2 Trials having reached full enrollment. The initiation of Phase 3 Oral VK2735 Trial for Obesity is anticipated in the fourth quarter of 2026. Additionally, an ongoing VK2735 Maintenance Dosing Study is in progress, and further updates are expected.
